tree.name: Tree Pose
tree.description: Stand rooted like an ancient tree. Balance on one foot while the other presses into your inner thigh. Raise your arms like branches reaching toward the sky to restore the Sacred Forest.
benefits: Stretches the groin and inner thighs
tutorial_steps: Start in Tadasana.
Shift your weight onto one foot.
Lift the other foot and press its sole against your inner calf or inner thigh - never directly on the knee.
Raise both arms overhead with palms touching.
Gaze at a fixed point and hold your balance.

correction_hints.arms_not_raised: Lift both arms straight above your head.
correction_hints.knee_not_bent: Lift your foot higher and press it to your inner thigh.
correction_hints.wobbling: Fix your gaze on a still point in front of you.

accuracy_guide_steps: Start in Tadasana.
Shift your weight onto one foot.
Lift the other foot and press its sole against your inner calf or inner thigh - never directly on the knee.
Raise both arms overhead with palms touching.
Gaze at a fixed point and hold your balance.

warrior.name: Warrior Pose
warrior.description: Stand as a guardian of the village. Wide stance, bent knee, arms reaching out to both sides - defend Lotus Haven from stress and chaos with the strength of a warrior.
tutorial_steps: Step one foot forward into a wide lunge.
Bend your front knee to roughly 90 - so your thigh is parallel to the floor.
Keep the back leg straight and strong.
Extend both arms at shoulder height for Warrior II, or raise them overhead for Warrior I.
Keep torso upright and core engaged.

correction_hints.knee_not_bent: Bend your front knee deeper until the thigh is parallel to the ground.
correction_hints.arms_not_extended: Reach both arms strongly to the sides at shoulder height.
correction_hints.stance_too_narrow: Widen your stance - step your feet further apart.

accuracy_guide_steps: Step one foot forward into a wide lunge.
Bend your front knee to roughly 90 - so your thigh is parallel to the floor.
Keep the back leg straight and strong.
Extend both arms at shoulder height for Warrior II, or raise them overhead for Warrior I.
Keep torso upright and core engaged.

padmasana.name: Lotus Pose
padmasana.description: Sit in sacred stillness. Cross your legs with feet resting on opposite thighs, spine tall, hands resting gently on your knees. Through meditation and stillness, restore the sacred lotus lake.
tutorial_steps: Sit on the floor with your spine tall.
Bend your right knee and place your right foot on your left thigh, sole facing up.
Bend your left knee and carefully place your left foot on your right thigh.
Rest your hands on your knees and keep your spine tall.
Do not force the pose if your knees protest.

correction_hints.knees_not_spread: Let both knees open wide and relax toward the floor.
correction_hints.spine_not_tall: Lengthen your spine - imagine a string pulling the crown of your head up.
correction_hints.feet_not_placed: Gently guide each foot onto the opposite thigh.

accuracy_guide_steps: Sit on the floor with your spine tall.
Bend your right knee and place your right foot on your left thigh, sole facing up.
Bend your left knee and carefully place your left foot on your right thigh.
Rest your hands on your knees and keep your spine tall.
Do not force the pose if your knees protest.

vajrasana.name: Thunderbolt Pose
vajrasana.description: Kneel with your spine perfectly upright like a thunderbolt. Sit on your heels with hands on your thighs. Summon the sacred rains through your steady, grounded stillness to restore the ancient Rain Temple.
tutorial_steps: Kneel on the floor.
Sit back onto your heels with your shins flat on the ground and feet pointing back.
Sit tall with your spine straight.
Rest your hands on your thighs.
Keep your feet together and breathe steadily.

correction_hints.knees_apart: Bring your knees together and sit evenly on both heels.
correction_hints.spine_curved: Straighten your back - lengthen upward through the crown of your head.
correction_hints.arms_raised: Lower your hands to rest gently on your thighs.

accuracy_guide_steps: Kneel on the floor.
Sit back onto your heels with your shins flat on the ground and feet pointing back.
Sit tall with your spine straight.
Rest your hands on your thighs.
Keep your feet together and breathe steadily.

baddha_konasana.name: Butterfly Pose
baddha_konasana.description: Sit with the soles of your feet pressed together and your knees wide like butterfly wings. Hold open and breathe, bringing life back to the enchanted butterfly sanctuary.
tutorial_steps: Sit on the floor with your spine tall.
Bend both knees and bring the soles of your feet together in front of you.
Let your knees fall out wide like butterfly wings.
Hold your feet with your hands.
Gently press your knees toward the floor without forcing them; stay upright.

correction_hints.knees_not_wide: Let both knees fall further out to the sides - relax your hips.
correction_hints.feet_apart: Bring the soles of your feet together and hold them with your hands.
correction_hints.spine_rounded: Sit tall - lengthen your spine upward with each inhale.

accuracy_guide_steps: Sit on the floor with your spine tall.
Bend both knees and bring the soles of your feet together in front of you.
Let your knees fall out wide like butterfly wings.
Hold your feet with your hands.
Gently press your knees toward the floor without forcing them; stay upright.

tadasana.name: Mountain Pose
tadasana.description: Stand tall and steady like the sacred Cloud Peak. Through Tadasana, restore balance between earth and sky, clear the mist, rebuild floating cloud pathways, and awaken the glowing summit of Lotus Haven.
tutorial_steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, arms at your sides.
Press all four corners of your feet into the ground.
Straighten your legs without locking your knees and lengthen your spine upward.
Relax your shoulders down and back; keep head centered and chin parallel to the floor.
Breathe and stand tall.

correction_hints.feet_unsteady: Ground both feet evenly and avoid leaning to one side.
correction_hints.spine_not_tall: Lift your chest and lengthen through the crown of your head.
correction_hints.arms_not_aligned: Keep your arms straight and balanced.

theme.title: Cloud Peak Restoration
levels: Dense fog begins to clear and mountain foothills become visible.
Floating cloud bridges begin forming around the mountain.
Clouds part and an ancient Sky Gate appears.
The summit glows with ancient energy and the cloud network is fully restored.

accuracy_guide_steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, arms at your sides.
Press all four corners of your feet into the ground.
Straighten your legs without locking your knees and lengthen your spine upward.
Relax your shoulders down and back; keep head centered and chin parallel to the floor.
Breathe and stand tall.

trikonasana.name: Triangle Pose
trikonasana.description: Extend into Triangle Pose to restore Prism Valley, awaken crystal paths, and bring rainbow light back to Lotus Haven.
tutorial_steps: Stand with feet wide apart, about 3 feet.
Turn your right foot out 90 degree.
Reach your right hand down toward your right ankle or shin while your left arm extends straight up.
Keep both legs straight and active.
Open your chest toward the ceiling; do not let it collapse forward. Switch sides.

correction_hints.stance_too_narrow: Step your feet wider to create a strong triangle base.
correction_hints.arms_not_open: Extend both arms in one long vertical line.
correction_hints.knees_bent: Keep both legs straighter and active.
correction_hints.torso_not_open: Open the chest sideways instead of collapsing forward.

accuracy_guide_steps: Stand with feet wide apart, about 3 feet.
Turn your right foot out 90 degree.
Reach your right hand down toward your right ankle or shin while your left arm extends straight up.
Keep both legs straight and active.
Open your chest toward the ceiling; do not let it collapse forward. Switch sides.

balasana.name: Balasana (Child Pose)
balasana.description: Fold into Balasana (Child's Pose) to rebuild roads and bridges, reconnect settlements, and restore prosperity across Lotus Haven.
benefits: Gently stretches hips, thighs, and ankles
Releases tension in the back and shoulders
Calms the mind and relieves stress
tutorial_steps: Kneel on the mat with your knees hip-width apart.
Sit back so your hips settle close to your heels.
Fold your torso forward and let your head lower toward the mat.
Stretch both arms forward along the mat and hold the pose.

correction_hints.hips_not_back: Sit your hips back closer to your heels.
correction_hints.torso_not_folded: Fold your torso forward and lower your head toward the mat.
correction_hints.arms_not_extended: Stretch both arms forward along the mat.
correction_hints.body_uneven: Keep your shoulders and hips level side to side.

accuracy_guide_steps: Kneel on the mat with your knees hip-width apart.
Sit back so your hips settle close to your heels.
Fold your torso forward and let your head lower toward the mat.
Stretch both arms forward along the mat and hold the pose.

bhujangasana.name: Bhujangasana
bhujangasana.description: Lift the chest like a cobra to awaken the ancient Serpent Temple hidden inside dense jungle ruins.
tutorial_steps: Lie face-down on the floor with legs together.
Place palms flat under your shoulders.
Press into your hands and slowly lift your chest off the ground.
Keep your hips and legs on the floor; elbows can stay slightly bent.
Roll your shoulders back, open your chest, and look slightly upward.
accuracy_guide_steps: Lie face-down on the floor with legs together.
Place palms flat under your shoulders.
Press into your hands and slowly lift your chest off the ground.
Keep your hips and legs on the floor; elbows can stay slightly bent.
Roll your shoulders back, open your chest, and look slightly upward.

wall_plank_chaturanga.name: Wall-Plank Chaturanga
wall_plank_chaturanga.description: Hold a safe wall-plank position with steady accuracy to restore the ancient Japanese mountain dojo.
tutorial_steps: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Place both palms flat on the wall at shoulder height.
Step back slightly so your body forms a diagonal line from head to heels.
Hold the wall-plank position with straight body alignment.
Keep breathing and stay steady until the hold timer completes.

correction_hints.body_sag: Keep body in one straight line from head to heels.
correction_hints.elbows_flared: Keep arms stable and shoulders controlled while holding.
correction_hints.hands_wrong: Place palms at shoulder height and keep contact with the wall.

accuracy_guide_steps: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Place both palms flat on the wall at shoulder height.
Step back slightly so your body forms a diagonal line from head to heels.
Hold the wall-plank position with straight body alignment.
Keep breathing and stay steady until the hold timer completes.

padahastasana.name: Padahastasana
padahastasana.description: Fold forward with calm breath to restore the golden maple valley and flowing autumn streams.
tutorial_steps: Stand tall.
Exhale and hinge forward from your hips, not your waist.
Let your torso fold down toward your legs.
Let your arms and hands hang down toward your feet or the floor.
Keep legs straight without locking the knees hard; relax your neck completely and let your head hang heavy.

correction_hints.head_up: Relax your head and neck downward.

accuracy_guide_steps: Stand tall.
Exhale and hinge forward from your hips, not your waist.
Let your torso fold down toward your legs.
Let your arms and hands hang down toward your feet or the floor.
Keep legs straight without locking the knees hard; relax your neck completely and let your head hang heavy.

paschimottanasana.name: Paschimottanasana
paschimottanasana.description: Sit and fold forward with calm breath to restore the Grand Clockwork Theater of the Forgotten Puppet Kingdom.
benefits: Stretches the back body and hamstrings
tutorial_steps: Sit on the floor with both legs extended straight in front of you.
Keep your spine tall.
Inhale to lengthen, then exhale and fold your torso forward over your legs.
Keep your back as long as possible rather than rounding sharply.
Reach hands toward your feet, ankles, or shins - wherever you reach comfortably.

correction_hints.not_folded: Fold forward gently from the hips.
correction_hints.spine_rounding: Lengthen your spine before deepening the fold.

accuracy_guide_steps: Sit on the floor with both legs extended straight in front of you.
Keep your spine tall.
Inhale to lengthen, then exhale and fold your torso forward over your legs.
Keep your back as long as possible rather than rounding sharply.
Reach hands toward your feet, ankles, or shins wherever you reach comfortably.

paschim_namaskarasana.name: Paschim Namaskarasana
paschim_namaskarasana.description: Stand tall with reverse prayer hands behind the back to restore the Peacock Palace and royal gardens.
tutorial_steps: Stand or sit tall.
Swing both arms behind your back.
Try to bring your palms together between your shoulder blades, fingers pointing upward.
Open your chest forward and roll your shoulders back.
If your palms cannot meet, hold your elbows or wrists behind you.

correction_hints.hands_not_back: Move both hands behind the back.

accuracy_guide_steps: Stand or sit tall.
Swing both arms behind your back.
Try to bring your palms together between your shoulder blades, fingers pointing upward.
Open your chest forward and roll your shoulders back.
If your palms cannot meet, hold your elbows or wrists behind you.

pranayama.name: Pranayama
pranayama.description: Practice calm breath awareness to awaken the Inner Prana Nexus, a cosmic body of stars and energy.
tutorial_steps: Sit comfortably : cross-legged on the floor or in a chair.
Keep spine tall, shoulders relaxed and level.
Close your eyes.
Breathe in slowly through your nose for 4 counts, hold for 2.
Exhale through your nose for 6 counts and keep repeating the pattern.

correction_hints.camera_not_clear: Keep upper body visible to the camera.

accuracy_guide_steps: Sit comfortably : cross-legged on the floor or in a chair.
Keep spine tall, shoulders relaxed and level.
Close your eyes.
Breathe in slowly through your nose for 4 counts, hold for 2.
Exhale through your nose for 6 counts and keep repeating the pattern.
